//: Scope config for this repo's installed acceptance/test-repo-standard.mjs — we live under the exact standard the plugin installs everywhere else.
//counts: The README states the standing-test count (twice); the lint derives the truth from acceptance/ so the claim can never go stale. Scoped to the README on purpose: the CHANGELOG's mention sits inside a dated release block — history, not a live claim — and must not fail forever once the suite grows.
